scripts.deploy: npm run build:prod && wrangler pages deploy dist --project-name shadyradio
scripts.build:dsp: cd dsp && emcmake cmake . && emmake make && cd ..
scripts.build:dsp:direct: emcc dsp/engine.cpp dsp/filters.cpp dsp/dynamics.cpp dsp/mixer.cpp dsp/beat_tracker.cpp dsp/automix.cpp -O3 -s WASM=1 -s EXPORTED_FUNCTIONS='["_init_engine","_process_audio","_get_input_buffer","_get_output_buffer","_get_meter_buffer","_set_channel_active","_set_channel_gain","_set_channel_eq","_set_channel_compression","_get_channel_bpm","_get_channel_beat_phase","_get_channel_phrase_phase","_get_channel_bpm_locked"]' -s EXPORTED_RUNTIME_METHODS='["HEAPF32","HEAP32"]' -s ALLOW_MEMORY_GROWTH=1 -o public/dsp/engine.js
